package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/base64"
)

// scenario for base64_encode_to_string_in_loop: Base64 encoding to string inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario439Positive(values [][]byte) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(value))
	}
	return out
}
